# UC-12.2.34 · Argo CD Redis / Dex Dependency Health from Server Logs

## Description

Auth and session backends failing cause login loops and stalled UI/API operations.

## Value

Provides early warning when Dex or Redis saturation impacts GitOps operators.

## Implementation

Collect logs from `argocd-server`, `argocd-dex-server`, and Redis pods. Correlate with pod restarts.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:server"
| search "redis" OR "dex" OR "oidc"
| search "error" OR "failed" OR "timeout"
| stats count by host, coalesce(logger, component)
| where count>=5
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Line chart (errors over time), Table (component × host).

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
- [Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)](https://github.com/splunk/Splunk-Infrastructure-Monitoring-App-for-ArgoCD)
